description_long: This object depicts a small residential complex consisting of four houses arranged around a central courtyard, surrounded by lush green trees. Each house features a steep red gable roof and pastel-colored facades, with the central house in yellow standing out as the focal point. The houses have multiple windows, symmetrically arranged, and the central pathway is lined with street lamps and landscaping. The complex is bordered by dense rows of trees, providing privacy and a park-like atmosphere. The overall design is reminiscent of European suburban neighborhoods, with a blend of traditional and modern elements. The entryways are simple, with no visible porches, but the central path and landscaping create a welcoming communal space.
description: A cluster of four pastel-colored houses with red gable roofs, arranged around a landscaped central courtyard and surrounded by dense trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central yellow house, flanked by two pastel houses and a tree-lined courtyard with street lamps.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back facades of the houses, with the red roofs and dense tree border more prominent.
description_view_2: Back view showing the yellow rear wall of the central house and the symmetrical arrangement of the other houses, with trees enclosing the complex.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the green and yellow houses, the central courtyard, and the surrounding trees, with the gable roofs clearly visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entryways with no visible porch, accessed via a central landscaped path, flanked by street lamps and trees.
